keyEvents.text: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match because of an injury Michal Sadílek (Czechia).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match because of an injury Tomás Holes (Czechia).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! Czechia 0, Mexico 1. Mateo Chávez (Mexico) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Luis Romo.
Substitution, Czechia. Lukás Provod replaces Denis Visinsky.
Goal! Czechia 0, Mexico 2. Julián Quiñones (Mexico) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Jorge Sánchez following a fast break.
Substitution, Mexico. Santiago Giménez replaces Guillermo Martínez.
Substitution, Mexico. Obed Vargas replaces Luis Romo.
Edson Álvarez (Mexico) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Czechia. Patrik Schick replaces Adam Hlozek.
Substitution, Czechia. Tomás Soucek replaces Tomás Holes.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Mexico. Álvaro Fidalgo replaces Gilberto Mora.
Substitution, Mexico. Guillermo Ochoa replaces Raúl Rangel.
Substitution, Mexico. Jesús Gallardo replaces Mateo Chávez.
Delay in match because of an injury Tomás Soucek (Czechia).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Czechia. Tomás Chory replaces Lukás Cerv.
Substitution, Czechia. Alexandr Sojka replaces Tomás Soucek because of an injury.
Goal! Czechia 0, Mexico 3. Álvaro Fidalgo (Mexico) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Roberto Alvarado.
